message:
chore(tests): fix unused variable warnings in test fixtures

Renames unused testLogger fixture parameters to _testLogger across E2E
and integration tests to suppress TypeScript/linter warnings:

- dcg-block-approve.spec.ts: All DCG endpoint tests use gw() helper
  directly, testLogger fixture provided but not actively used
- test-fixture.ts: logEvent and describeWithLogging helpers receive
  fixture for extension purposes but don't reference it directly
- beads-integration.test.ts: Formatting fix for long line

The underscore prefix convention signals intentional non-use while
preserving fixture injection for future logging enhancements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
